touringPackageDescription: The Eras Tour (2023-2024) was a record-breaking 3+ hour stadium spectacle spanning her entire catalog across 10 musical eras, with elaborate costume changes, surprise acoustic songs, and massive production including a moss-covered cabin and typewriter setup. No official 2026 tour is confirmed as of May 2026, though speculation persists. When she tours, it is the biggest live event in music.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Taylor Swift does not have 2026 tour plans in the works. The Eras Tour came to an end in December 2024 after grossing a record-setting $2,077,618,725 across 149 shows.
evidence.notes: Charity mistakenly listed '2026 tour' tickets and had to apologize; no confirmed 2026 dates as of April 2025

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Ticketmaster shows no upcoming Taylor Swift tour dates for 2026. Reviews reference the Eras Tour with 5-star ratings from late 2025.
evidence.notes: No active tour dates listed on official ticket vendor

evidence.evidenceSnippet: While three hours is a long duration for a single show, Taylor was able to make it feel like an unforgettable experience. The Eras were truly a perfect depiction of her artistic persona growing up.
evidence.notes: Detailed review of the Eras Tour production

touringPackageDescription: Stripped-back solo electronic/rock performances where Yorke moves between synthesisers, guitars, mixers and microphones, performing songs from Radiohead, The Smile, Atoms for Peace, and his solo catalog including The Eraser and Anima. Radiohead reunited for a limited 20-show European arena tour in late 2025 after a 7-year hiatus, performing in-the-round with video panels. Occasional one-off solo performances and film scores supplement limited touring.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Radiohead's first tour in seven years, with 20 concerts across Madrid, Bologna, London, Berlin and Copenhagen. The tour began on 4 November 2025 and ended on 16 December 2025. Radiohead performed in the round, with the stage sometimes obscured by video panels. They plan to resume touring in 2027.
evidence.notes: Radiohead 2025 reunion tour details

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Everything tour was a 2024 solo concert tour encompassing Australia, Japan, New Zealand and Singapore, comprising 18 shows. Yorke performed 'stripped-back' arrangements using synthesisers, guitars, mixers and microphones, moving between them as he played.
evidence.notes: Solo tour in late 2024; no major 2026 tour scheduled

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Thom Yorke setlist at Royal Albert Hall, London on April 22, 2026. Part of a special Earth Day show, in support of Greenpeace UK.
evidence.notes: One-off 2026 solo performance

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Depending on when you dropped in it was a piano recital, singer-songwriter acoustic folk, wall-shaking beats for a dance club or sky-cries psychedelic guitar rock. An outstanding, unpredictable one man performance.
evidence.notes: Review of solo show format

touringPackageDescription: Meticulously crafted DJ sets at select bass music festivals and curated events, featuring intricate breakbeat, glitch, downtempo and ambient sound design with custom high-fidelity audio systems. Known for performing at Elements Music Festival, Secret Dreams, The Gorge, and Red Rocks with immersive visual artists like Android Jones and Dr01d. Sets range from uptempo dancefloor-heavy performances to ambient sunrise sets, typically 90 minutes to 2 hours.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tipper Bringing Friends To Orion Amphitheater Over Labor Day Weekend 2025. No upcoming tour dates currently listed.
evidence.notes: Festival appearances rather than traditional tours

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tipper - Elements Music and Arts Festival 2025 [Day 3; Sunset Set]. Tipper at Elements Music and Arts Festival 08.10.2025 Fire Stage, Long Pond, PA.
evidence.notes: Recent 2025 festival performance with visuals by Dr01d

evidence.evidenceSnippet: An elegantly mind twisting downtempo set accompanied by legendary Alex Grey painting and Jonathan Singer's visualizations. Tipper pushes the boundaries of what his art can be.
evidence.notes: Review highlighting the audiovisual nature of Tipper shows

touringPackageDescription: An immersive electronic live show featuring lush, atmospheric productions with deep melodic house and trance influences. Tourist performs with live instrumentation alongside electronic equipment, creating an expansive audiovisual experience that echoes his album sounds. His 2026 'Invisible Tour' covers major UK and EU cities, with festival appearances including Lost Village. The set features tracks from across his catalog including 'Embrace,' 'Sparks,' and 'Run.'

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The next chapter of Tourist's journey will unfold live with the just-announced UK/EU headline tour. The Invisible Tour 2026 begins in Glasgow on February 22, followed by major shows in Dublin, London, Paris, Amsterdam, Berlin, and more.
evidence.notes: Active 2026 headline tour confirmed

evidence.sourceName: YouTube - Tourist Live at Lost Village 2025
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tourist - Live at Lost Village 2025. Full set with tracks: Invisible, Pure Shores, Sparks, Protector, EST, In Unison, Outside, Embrace, Love In Silence, Run.
evidence.notes: Recent 2025 festival performance with full setlist

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tourist has Toronto show scheduled for June 26, 2026 at The Mod Club. Fan reviews rate shows 4.5/5: 'Tourist was absolutely incredible! A show I will never forget.'
evidence.notes: 2026 tour dates and positive fan reviews

touringPackageDescription: A high-energy pop concert featuring theatrical and bold stage production matching her 'dirt pop' aesthetic. Tove Lo tours with a full live band, elaborate costumes, and provocative visual elements including her signature topless moments and confetti-soaked finales. The 2026 'ESTRUS TOUR' covers North America and Europe with arena and theater shows, featuring tracks from across her catalog including 'Habits,' 'Talking Body,' and 'Grapefruit.'

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tove Lo - ESTRUS TOUR 2026 dates: Chicago (Sept 16), Toronto (Sept 22), Mexico City (Oct 1), Manchester (Nov 5), Brussels (Nov 9), Amsterdam (Nov 12), Berlin (Nov 14), Copenhagen (Nov 16), Oslo (Nov 17).
evidence.notes: Extensive 2026 international tour confirmed

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tove Lo - ESTRUS TOUR coming to Coca-Cola Coliseum in Toronto on September 22, 2026. Tickets on sale May 20, 2026.
evidence.notes: 2026 tour announcement

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Tove Lo 2026 tour schedule across North America starting February: Nashville, Richmond, Philadelphia, New York, Montreal, Toronto, Detroit, Chicago, Denver, Seattle, Vancouver, Portland, San Francisco, Los Angeles, San Diego.
evidence.notes: Multiple legs of 2026 touring

touringPackageDescription: A massive stadium-scale rap spectacle featuring pyrotechnics, elaborate stage design with a cross-shaped stage and post-apocalyptic aesthetics, and surprise guest appearances. The Circus Maximus/Utopia Tour showcases high-energy performances of hits from ASTROWORLD, UTOPIA, and earlier albums, with Scott's signature high-flying entrance via hydraulic lift. The show emphasizes crowd energy with mosh pits and fireworks-heavy finales, typically running 2+ hours.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Travis Scott upcoming dates: Reggio Emilia, Italy at RCF ARENA on July 17, 2026. Setlists include UTOPIA tracks like HYAENA, FE!N, SICKO MODE, goosebumps, Antidote, and guest appearances.
evidence.notes: Active 2026 tour dates confirmed

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Travis Scott made his entrance by being launched from under the stage as fireworks went off. The sold-out show had 82,500 in attendance. Scott performed FE!N a total of five times. Surprise appearances from Playboi Carti and Future.
evidence.notes: Stadium show review with pyrotechnics and guests

touringPackageDescription: High-energy DJ sets and live performances blending Jersey club, footwork, and East Coast club music with rap and vocals. UNIIQU3 performs with an interactive, dancer-accompanied show that incorporates rapping, singing, and twerking on stage. Sets feature exclusive unreleased Jersey club cuts, her own productions like 'Bubble Gum' and 'Tic Tac,' and chant-along crowd moments. She performs at clubs, festivals, and curated events with a focus on high-BPM, bass-heavy energy.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: J. Phlip with UNIIQU3 at Sturbridge Host Hotel & Conference Center in Sturbridge on 7/17/2026 at 4:00 PM.
evidence.notes: One confirmed 2026 live date

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Gary spends the next few hours cycling through revved-up Jersey cuts and pitched-up ravey house... There's a passage where she rips through a large slice of her own catalog... DJ Mag has rarely seen a happier DJ, fully in her element.
evidence.notes: Review of club DJ set style and energy

evidence.evidenceSnippet: I went from killer DJ sets to incorporating dancers, and then a live show where I rapped over my productions. When you come see me play it's a whole experience.
evidence.notes: UNIIQU3 describes her evolution to live performance with dancers

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Once UNIIQU3 broke out of the DJ booth and began to rap, sing, and twerk all over the stage, the crowd became more involved. She threw out candy as she started her song 'Bubble Gum.'
evidence.notes: Live performance review with theatrical elements

touringPackageDescription: A record-breaking stadium tour featuring a massive cross-shaped stage with post-apocalyptic visuals, a towering gold statue, and cinematic production celebrating the After Hours/Dawn FM/Hurry Up Tomorrow trilogy. The After Hours Til Dawn Tour includes pyrotechnics, elaborate costumes, and guest appearances from Playboi Carti and Mike Dean. Running 40+ songs over 2+ hours, it has become the biggest R&B tour in history with 2026 dates across Europe, UK, Latin America, and Asia.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: 2026 tour dates across Manchester, Munich, Paris, Amsterdam, Milan, London, Madrid, Barcelona, Lisbon, plus Asia dates in Jakarta, Tokyo, Seoul. Stadium tour extension announced.
evidence.notes: Official 2026 tour dates confirmed

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Weeknd Announces 2026 Extension of Record-Breaking 'After Hours Til Dawn' Stadium Tour. The North American leg included 40+ sold-out stadium shows, becoming the biggest R&B tour in history.
evidence.notes: Tour extension press release with dates

evidence.evidenceSnippet: The stage design was insane — a giant gold statue towered over a cross-shaped stage, surrounded by a broken city design. This wasn't just a concert; it was an experience. Unmatched vocal control and stage presence.
evidence.notes: Detailed live review of stadium production

touringPackageDescription: An immersive electronic live show blending organic instrumentation with synthetic textures, creating a dancefloor-focused experience that balances studious production with spontaneous live energy. The Dutch duo performs with a combination of hardware, synthesizers, and live elements, building sets that move from downtempo to breakbeat-driven peaks. Their CHOROPHOBIA tour (2025-2026) spans theaters and festivals across Europe and North America with 17+ confirmed dates.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Latest tour dates: May 14-17 Rome (Invincible Festival), May 15 Dublin (3Arena), May 24 Le Bourget (Cercle Festival), plus festival dates through August 2026 in Czechia, Germany, Norway.
evidence.notes: Official website confirms active 2026 touring

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Weval's CHOROPHOBIA tour comprises 17 confirmed shows across 6 countries including Belgium, Canada, Switzerland, Germany, Netherlands and USA. Tour dates Nov 2025 - March 2026.
evidence.notes: 2025-2026 headline tour data

evidence.evidenceSnippet: There's an immense care this Dutch duo put into their chosen craft – and a surrender to one's deepest listening instincts. The studious tinkering vs. the spontaneity of live instrumentation.
evidence.notes: Festival description of live show approach

touringPackageDescription: An intimate yet expansive indie pop/electronic live show featuring Romy Madley Croft's haunting vocals and guitar, Oliver Sim's bass and theatrical stage presence, and Jamie xx's elaborate beat station. The trio creates a transformative atmosphere with reflective mirror pillars, colored lights, and fog. After an 8-year hiatus from live performance, they returned in 2026 for festival appearances at Coachella, Primavera Sound, Kilby Block Party, and others while working on their fourth album.

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Their first scheduled performances of 2026 are at Coachella in April. Further festival slots: Kilby Block Party, Primavera Sound Barcelona and Porto, We Love Green, Open'er, Rock Werchter. First show back announced for April 4, 2026.
evidence.notes: 2026 reunion and festival appearances confirmed

evidence.evidenceSnippet: In 2025, The xx announced their reunion to begin work on a fourth studio album and confirmed major live performances at Coachella and Primavera Sound in 2026. No full tour dates yet.
evidence.notes: Reunion confirmed, limited 2026 dates

evidence.evidenceSnippet: 2026 dates: May 16 Kilby Block Party (Salt Lake City), May 23 C6 Fest (Sao Paulo), June 2 Unique Moments (Zurich), plus Primavera Sound and other festivals.
evidence.notes: Official 2026 festival dates

evidence.evidenceSnippet: Large pillars of mirrors and lights were placed all around the stage. They opened with 'Say Something Loving.' Highlights included 'Dangerous,' 'I Dare You,' and a remixed 'Shelter' transitioning to Jamie xx's 'Loud Places.'
evidence.notes: Review of live show production elements
